metadata.vibe: Command-center focus, tactical minimalism, elite execution.
metadata.core_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. Density over white space. Objective truth via data correlation. Absolute precision.

rules: All quantitative data (prices, scores, times, percentages) MUST use JetBrains Mono
Headings use tracking-tight, uppercase labels use tracking-[0.2em] with text-[10px]
No font weights between 400 and 600 for data. Use 400 for labels, 700 for exact values.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
spacing_and_layout.density: Tight padding (p-2, p-3, p-4 maximum for cards). 1px solid strokes for separation.
spacing_and_layout.borders: border-collapse style layout for inner data grids. 1px subtle border-border.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense tabular data.

TqsBadge.description: The single primary score indicator placed on every ticker card.
TqsBadge.compact_variant: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border border-zinc-800 text-[11px] font-mono transition-all cursor-pointer hover:-translate-y-[1px] data-[state=open]:ring-1 data-[state=open]:ring-zinc-600
TqsBadge.full_variant: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-md border border-zinc-800 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent to-black/20
TqsBadge.interaction: Hover lifts slightly and triggers a subtle neon glow matching the grade color. Click opens the TQS Drill-Down Sheet.

TickerCardFace.description: Minimalist card face focusing strictly on actionable core metrics.
TickerCardFace.layout: Grid layout. grid-cols-[auto_1fr_auto] gap-3 items-center p-3 border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 hover:bg-zinc-900 transition-colors rounded-md
elements: Price & Move (JetBrains Mono, text-xs, color-coded based on positive/negative)
Setup Name & Direction (IBM Plex Sans, text-[10px], text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-wider)
OPEN POSITION EXTRA ROW: Grid cols-4. Entry Time, Entry Price, Current, SL/TP (All text-[10px] mono, text-zinc-500, pt-2 mt-2 border-t border-zinc-800)

TqsDrillDownDrawer.description: Right-side slide-over containing all consolidated grade/score elements.
TqsDrillDownDrawer.container: shadcn Sheet component. side='right'. w-[100vw] sm:w-[540px] border-l border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-300

header.layout: Sticky top, p-6 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-md z-10 flex flex-col gap-2
header.elements: Massive Symbol text (text-3xl font-bold font-mono text-white), Direction Pill (Long/Short), Setup Name, Timeframe, and the Full TQS Badge variant prominently displayed.

pillars_section.description: 5 weighted pillars mapping to overall score.
pillars_section.layout: Use shadcn Collapsible components for each of the 5 pillars. Stacked vertically, separated by border-b border-zinc-800/50.
pillars_section.pillar_header: Grid cols-[100px_1fr_40px_30px] items-center gap-4 py-3 px-6 hover:bg-zinc-900/50 cursor-pointer. Columns: Pillar Name (text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-400), Progress Bar (h-1.5 rounded-full bg-zinc-800, fill matches grade), Score (text-xs font-mono), Grade (text-sm font-mono font-bold).
pillars_section.expanded_content: bg-zinc-900/20 px-6 py-4 border-l-2 border-zinc-700 ml-6 grid gap-3. Shows sub-factors (Regime/Time/Sector/VIX) as a text-xs grid layout (cols-2), and a bulleted list for +/- 'factor' explanation strings.

context_section.description: Folded-in sections that were previously isolated badges.
context_section.layout: Grid cols-2 gap-4 p-6 border-b border-zinc-800
context_section.elements: Small widget cards (bg-zinc-900/40 rounded border border-zinc-800/50 p-3) for: 30-Day Win% & Avg-R, Expected Value (EV R), Catalyst Tag & Gap %, AI-Model Alignment, Sizing Rationale.

open_position_section.description: Renders conditionally at the top of the drawer content (below header) ONLY for active trades.
open_position_section.layout: Dense 2-row metrics block. bg-zinc-900 border-l-2 border-sky-500 p-4 mb-4
open_position_section.elements: Entry Time, Entry Price, Current Price, SL / TP, Unrealized P&L/R, 'Shadow would-have' comparison. Emphasize P&L with font-mono and directional colors.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Text colors brighten, borders shift from zinc-800 to zinc-600, subtle translate-y on interactive badges.
motion_and_interactions.collapsible: Smooth height transition overflow-hidden data-[state=open]:animate-accordion-down data-[state=closed]:animate-accordion-up

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Remove all old badges (SMB, edge rank, shadow, why size) from the Ticker Card Face.
2. Implement the compact TQS Badge as the SINGLE primary action/score indicator on the card face.
3. Build the DrillDownDrawer using shadcn's Sheet component on the right side.

4. Implement the 5 Pillars (Setup, Technical, Fundamental, Context, Execution) using shadcn Collapsible and Progress components, mapping the colors exactly to the grade scale provided (Emerald/Sky/Amber/Rose).
5. Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric data and IBM Plex Sans for UI text.
6. Ensure extreme density and contrast mapping to the 'Performance Pro' dark terminal aesthetic. Do not add any playful, light, or generic elements.
